commit_scope: Add a recent activity timeline to the restored /today task card so returning users can see recent lifecycle and completion events.

phase_gate.blocked_reason: Awaiting push, PR checks, and merge.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The restored /today task card now shows the latest lifecycle and completion events for the task so users can understand recent activity without leaving the page.
test_flows: Launch a task from /today and verify the Recent activity section appears on the latest task card.
Refresh /today and verify the restored task card still shows the recent activity timeline.
Use quick updates or refresh and verify the timeline updates with newer task lifecycle or completion events.
